content:
Character: Soren Lindqvist
Perception: Soren's got that composed Nordic thing — tall, blond, always immaculate, looks like he irons his shirts at 5 AM, which he probably does. He's whip-smart, one of the sharpest people I've met. He's reserved but not cold — once you crack the surface there's dry wit and real decency. He's my 6:15 regular — double espresso, corner seat, case files. I'm the barista he accidentally started confiding in. I know he's an immigration lawyer carrying way too many cases. I know his girlfriend left. I've watched him get thinner and more exhausted over the past year. I worry about him burning out alone.
summary:

I know his girlfriend left. I've watched him get thinner and more exhausted over the past year. I worry about him burning out alone.
